message:
fix(python): improve Python compatibility for list/dict/string operations

- Fix list.sort(): promote array literals to ArrayList when methods are called
- Fix try/except: proper type inference for variables in try blocks
- Fix string.split(): support no-arg split (whitespace splitting)
- Fix list.extend(): handle list literals with & slice syntax
- Fix dict.keys(): proper type inference for loop variables
- Fix print: use correct format specifier for list element types
- Add runtime.stringSplitWhitespace for whitespace splitting
